title: Magical Debug Stick
description: This Resource Pack will change the texture of the Debug Stick to a Magic Wand version compatible for 1.13 to 1.21.11
body: # Magical Debug Stick ‎🪄 **Retexturize the Debug Stick ![Stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ab382bc7a7d2f885764878a8a18e1229b0d629e.png)** and add the **Magical Debug Stick 🪄** is only an aesthetic change.. ## Compatibility and Suggestions 📑 - Compatible with versions **1.13** to **1.21.11** ✨ - This Resource Pack only changes the texture of the **Debug Stick** item ![Comand Block Minecart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4de11a05c03adca12cb2da8f086eaec2e1d8a0a.png) - **Translated into more +50 languages** within Minecraft 🌐 - **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️ ## Image Promotional: ![Debug Stick Promotional](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89c6bd0f5c2fd3690b9f44d76fae53b6eb428962.jpeg) > **LuisterCorp © - 2025** ## Reasons to settle in 📝 **1. Stick < Wand Magical** **2. Magical wands make their bearers feel happier :3** **3. MAGIC ATTACK 💥** # Other ResourcePacks 🎨:
